overall.description: Static cinematic shot from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing students in wizard robes gathered on grassy castle grounds. Gothic-style towers with golden and red stone facades rise in the background under a partly cloudy sky, while small groups of students stand and converse in the foreground.

agents.ego_description: standing still on the grassy grounds, observing the students and castle architecture

notable_agents.action: student holding a broomstick and conversing with two other students
group of three students standing together in dark robes

entered.detail: tall tower with ornate golden roof and red stone base
prominent red and gold tower with pointed roof
cluster of grey Gothic spires visible behind the main towers
large vertical tapestry banner hanging on the right side
green grassy hill where students are standing

segments.scene_description: A static view of Hogwarts castle grounds with students gathered on a grassy slope. Gothic towers with golden and red facades dominate the background under a partly cloudy sky. Small groups of students in robes stand scattered across the lawn, with one student holding a broomstick conversing with peers on the right, while three others stand together on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of the Hogwarts castle grounds where students gather under a vast, shifting sky. It begins with a wide view of the grassy slopes, dominated by the towering Gothic architecture of the castle with its distinctive golden and red stone facades. As the eye wanders across the lawn, the scene reveals small clusters of students in wizarding robes engaged in quiet conversation. The focus then settles on the diverse groups scattered throughout the landscape, from a trio standing together on the left to a student holding a broomstick conversing with peers on the right.
